video: Video 2: Intro to Component Builder (11:27) + Video 3: Create an Asset Library with Megascans (11:10)

node_sequence.notes: Menu: New Pane -> Solaris -> Asset Catalog. This is a UI pane, not a node.

node_sequence.description: Create a new asset database file
node_sequence.notes: Gear icon in Asset Catalog pane -> 'Create New Asset Database File'. This creates the backing .db file.
In Component Output: View Thumbnail Camera -> Generate Thumbnail. MUST be done BEFORE Save to Disk.
Component Output -> Save to Disk. Exports the .usd file.

node_sequence.description: Add the saved asset to the Asset Catalog
node_sequence.notes: After saving, add to the Asset Catalog. Assets can then be dragged and dropped into any scene.

parameters.order_of_operations: Generate Thumbnail -> Save to Disk -> Add to Asset Catalog

constraints: Order of operations is CRITICAL: Generate Thumbnail -> Save to Disk -> Add to Asset Catalog. Do NOT skip or reorder.
The Asset Catalog is a UI pane opened via New Pane -> Solaris -> Asset Catalog.
Asset database must be created first (Gear icon -> Create New Asset Database File).
For batch processing multiple assets, use TOPs (PDG) with 'USD Assets to Gallery' node.
Shift+V in the TOP network triggers batch processing of all assets into the gallery.
Assets in the gallery can be dragged and dropped directly into Solaris viewports.
test_criteria: Manual workflow: (1) Open Asset Catalog pane. (2) Create new database. (3) In Component Builder: Generate Thumbnail, Save to Disk, Add to Gallery. (4) Verify asset appears in catalog with thumbnail. (5) Drag asset from catalog into a scene — verify Reference LOP is created. For batch: (6) Create TOP network with 'USD Assets to Gallery' node. (7) Press Shift+V to batch process.

tops_batch.description: Instead of manually clicking 'Add to Asset Gallery' for each asset, create a TOP Network with 'USD Assets to Gallery' node and press Shift+V to batch process all assets in the folder into the gallery.
tops_batch.verification_note: The exact TOP node type name 'USD Assets to Gallery' needs live Houdini verification. The Shift+V shortcut for batch processing also needs verification — it may be a custom shelf tool or a built-in PDG shortcut.
